Class PickingPointsSystem

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
public class PickingPointsSystem extends Object
Management system for Amazingco picking points. Holds the collection of available picking points and provides queries to find nearby points, points with free space, eligible points for a given package, and lists of operative/out-of-service points.

      public PickingPointsSystem()
      Constructor for PickingPointsSystem.

  • Method Details

    • addPickingPoint

      public void addPickingPoint(PickingPoint pickingPoint)
      Adds a picking point to the system.
      Parameters:
      pickingPoint - PickingPoint to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pickingPoint is null or has a duplicate identifier

    • removePickingPoint

      public void removePickingPoint(String identifier)
      Removes a picking point identified by the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      identifier - String identifier of the picking point to remove
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if identifier is null or no picking point with that identifier exists

    • getOperativePickingPoints

      public List<PickingPoint> getOperativePickingPoints()
      Returns a list of all operative picking points.
      Returns:
      List of operative PickingPoint instances

    • getOutOfServicePickingPoints

      public List<PickingPoint> getOutOfServicePickingPoints()
      Returns a list of all out-of-service picking points.
      Returns:
      List of non-operative PickingPoint instances

    • getNearbyPickingPoints

      public List<PickingPoint> getNearbyPickingPoints(es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate gps, Double radius)
      Returns picking points within the given radius of the provided GPS coordinate.
      Parameters:
      gps - GPSCoordinate center point
      radius - Double radius
      Returns:
      List of nearby PickingPoint instances
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if gps or radius are null

    • getPickingPointsWithAvailableSpace

      public List<PickingPoint> getPickingPointsWithAvailableSpace()
      Returns picking points that currently have free space.
      Returns:
      List of PickingPoint instances with available space

    • getEligiblePickingPoints

      public List<PickingPoint> getEligiblePickingPoints(es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate gps, Double radius, Package pkg)
      Returns picking points within the radius that are eligible for the given package according to its type and payment status.
      Parameters:
      gps - GPSCoordinate center point
      radius - Double radius
      pkg - Package for which to find eligible points
      Returns:
      List of eligible PickingPoint instances
